use rayon::prelude::*;
use std::fs;

// BAD: blocking I/O inside Rayon CPU-bound parallel closures
fn process_files(paths: &[String]) -> Vec<ProcessedFile> {
    paths.par_iter()
        .map(|path| {
            // Blocking file I/O in CPU thread pool
            let content = fs::read_to_string(path).unwrap();
            let parsed = parse_content(&content);
            ProcessedFile {
                path: path.clone(),
                data: parsed,
            }
        })
        .collect()
}

fn fetch_and_process(urls: &[String]) -> Vec<Result> {
    urls.par_iter()
        .map(|url| {
            // Blocking network I/O in CPU thread pool
            let response = reqwest::blocking::get(url).unwrap();
            let body = response.text().unwrap();
            process_body(&body)
        })
        .collect()
}
